summary: Pass. The latest task verification run succeeded from 2026-04-10T04:01:53Z to 2026-04-10T04:04:59Z (`.machine/runtime/results/verify.result.json`), `.machine/runtime/logs/verify.log` ends with `Verification passed.` at line 3036, and no modified/untracked task files are newer than `verify.log`.

requirements.requirement: AR-001 Private stash scan publishes a complete v2-backed snapshot without losing the last good publish on failure
evidence: `AtomicRequirements.json` defines AR-001-B01..B07.
Latest verify run passed TM-001, TM-002, TM-003, TM-004, TM-005, TM-006, and TM-045 in `.machine/runtime/logs/verify.log` at lines 2290, 2303, 2316, 2329, 2342, 2355, and 2955.
The final verify run is the current repo state: all modified/untracked task files are not newer than `.machine/runtime/logs/verify.log`.

requirements.requirement: AR-002 Backend price quality classification is canonical and user-visible
evidence: Latest verify run passed TM-007, TM-008, TM-009, and TM-010 in `.machine/runtime/logs/verify.log` at lines 2368, 2381, 2394, and 2407.
`poe_trade/stash_scan.py:34-37` defines the frozen price-band version and 10% / 25% thresholds.
`poe_trade/stash_scan.py:149-166` implements absolute-delta banding and the locked label mapping `good->well_priced`, `mediocre->could_be_better`, `bad->mispriced`.

requirements.requirement: AR-003 Published stash snapshot and item history read paths prefer the optimized item-centric model
evidence: Latest verify run passed TM-011 through TM-018 and TM-046 in `.machine/runtime/logs/verify.log` at lines 2420, 2433, 2446, 2459, 2472, 2485, 2498, 2511, and 2968.
`poe_trade/stash_scan.py:743-766` reads published items from `poe_trade.v_account_stash_latest_scan_items` and only falls back to legacy rows when the v2 payload is empty.
`poe_trade/stash_scan.py:816-836` reads item history from `poe_trade.account_stash_item_history_v2` with the frozen 90-day retention filter, then falls back to legacy history only if needed.

requirements.requirement: AR-004 Valuation refresh uses persisted published rows and reconciles cache entries against published scan identity
evidence: Latest verify run passed TM-019 through TM-031, TM-047 through TM-050, and FM-003 in `.machine/runtime/logs/verify.log` at lines 2524, 2537, 2550, 2563, 2576, 2589, 2602, 2615, 2628, 2641, 2654, 2667, 2680, 2981, 2994, 3007, 3020, and 3034.

The previously missing targeted tests now exist in the tree: `tests/unit/test_api_stash_valuations.py:951`, `:1231`, `:1610`, `:1886`, `:2040`, `:2117`, and `tests/unit/test_account_stash_harvester.py:463`.
`poe_trade/stash_scan.py:502-604` prefers persisted refresh status/published rows for the current published scan before idle fallback.

`poe_trade/ingestion/account_stash_harvester.py:945-1019` loads persisted published source rows from v2 first and fails closed on incomplete recovery; `:1029-1130` writes `valuation_refresh` lifecycle rows with `source_scan_id`.

requirements.requirement: AR-005 Schema migrations preserve the v2 query path, retention, backfill, and refresh lifecycle contract
evidence: Latest verify run passed TM-032, TM-033, TM-034, TM-035, and TM-036 in `.machine/runtime/logs/verify.log` at lines 2693, 2706, 2719, 2732, and 2745.
`schema/migrations/0089_private_stash_scan_query_paths.sql:1-122` defines `account_stash_scan_items_v2`, `account_stash_item_history_v2`, `v_account_stash_latest_scan_items`, and 90-day TTLs.
`schema/migrations/0090_private_stash_scan_retention.sql:1-8` applies 90-day TTLs to scan runs, active scans, and published scans.

`schema/migrations/0092_private_stash_scan_price_evaluation.sql:1-5` adds backend `price_evaluation` columns, and `schema/migrations/0093_private_stash_refresh_lifecycle_metadata.sql:1-11` adds `scan_kind` and `source_scan_id`.

requirements.requirement: AR-006 API contract and client normalization preserve the stash-scan price-quality surface
evidence: Latest verify run passed TM-037, TM-038, TM-039, TM-040, and TM-041 in `.machine/runtime/logs/verify.log` at lines 2764, 2777, 2790, 2803, and 2816.

`apispec.yml:1145-1235` defines the valuation response price-quality fields including `listedPriceChaos`, `estimatedPriceChaos`, `priceDeltaChaos`, `priceDeltaPercent`, `priceBand`, `priceEvaluation`, and `priceBandVersion`.
The OpenAPI proof that previously failed now passes in the final verify run: TM-039 at `.machine/runtime/logs/verify.log:2790`.

requirements.requirement: AR-007 The stash viewer visibly preserves backend good-or-not-good judgments
evidence: Latest verify run passed TM-042, TM-043, and TM-044 in `.machine/runtime/logs/verify.log` at lines 2858, 2900, and 2942.
`src/components/tabs/StashViewerTab.tsx:147-172` maps backend price bands/evaluations to visible labels.

`src/components/tabs/StashViewerTab.tsx:200-233` preserves backend `priceBand` / `priceEvaluation` during valuation-result merges and only falls back to local computation when backend values are absent.
